---
name: "[HOTFIX] Urgent Fix"
about: Critical issue requiring immediate fix — title must start with [HOTFIX]
title: "[HOTFIX] "
labels: hotfix, bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

What is broken and why is this urgent?

## Impact

- Who is affected?
- What happens if not fixed immediately?

## Root Cause

If known, describe the root cause.

## Proposed Fix

Describe the fix or workaround.

## Environment

- **marmonitor**: (run `marmonitor --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.3)
